response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched video, identified two distinct vocal performances separated by a scene transition. 2. Performed OCR/metadata identification: First song is 'Don't say "lazy"' (on-screen text), performed by AZKi and Tokoyami Towa. Second song is '星座になれたら' (on-screen text), performed by AZKi and Tokoyami Towa. 3. Researched lyrics for both songs using original artists: 'Don't say "lazy"' by 桜高軽音部 and '星座になれたら' by 結束バンド. 4. Obtained full lyrics and translations for both. 5. Formatted into the requested JSON schema.
response.global_summary: The video features a live music performance by two VTubers, performing two Japanese songs: 'Don't say "lazy"' and '星座になれたら' (If I Could Be A Constellation).

scenes.description: The VTubers perform the song 'Don't say "lazy"'. Text on screen indicates 'Don't say "lazy"'. Original song by 桜高軽音部 (Sakurakou K-ON Bu).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Please don't say "you are lazy"
だって本当はcrazy
白鳥たちはそう
見えないとこでバタ足するんです
本能に順従忠実 翻弄も重々承知
前途洋々だし
だからたまに休憩しちゃうんです

この目でしっかり見定めて
行き先 地図上マークして
近道あれば それが王道
はしょれる翼もあれば上等

ヤバ 爪割れた グルーで補修した
それだけで なんか達成感
大事なのは自分かわいがること
自分を愛さなきゃ他人も愛せない

Please don't say "you are lazy"
だって本当はcrazy
能ある鷹はそう
見えないとこにピック隠すんです
想像に一生懸命 現実は絶体絶命
発展途中だし
だから不意にピッチ外れるんです

いつでも全力で夢見て
その分全力で眠って

ヤリ ちょい痩せた 調子づいて喰った
それだけで なんで? 敗北感
すかさずに目標 下方修正して
柔軟に臨機応変 七変化が勝ち

Please don't say "you are lazy"
だって本当はcrazy
孔雀たちはそう
ここぞというとき美を魅せるんです
五臓六腑 満身邁進 願望は痩身麗人
誘惑多発だし
だからやけに意志砕けちゃうんです

ヤバ まさか赤点 いや ギリクリア!
それだけで なんて全能感
大事なのは自分認めてくこと
自分を許さなきゃ他人も許せない

Please don't say "you are lazy"
だって本当はcrazy
白鳥たちはそう
見えないとこでバタ足するんです
本能に順従忠実 翻弄も重々承知
前途洋々だし
だからたまに休憩しちゃうんです
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Please don't say 'You are lazy'
Because actually I am crazy
Swans are like that
They are thrashing their feet in places you cannot see
I am perfectly aware of being obedient and faithful to my instincts, and also of being played with
My future is bright, after all
That's why I sometimes slack off

I will fix my destination on the map by looking at it closely with these eyes
If there is a shortcut, that is the best path
It is excellent to have wings that allow me to skip over things
Oh no, my nail broke, I fixed it with glue
Just that gives me a sense of accomplishment
What is important is to cherish oneself
If you don't love yourself, you cannot love others

Please don't say 'You are lazy'
Because actually I am crazy
Skilled hawks are like that
They hide their picks in places you cannot see
I am desperate in my imagination, yet reality is a desperate situation
I am still in the middle of development, after all
That is why I suddenly go off-pitch

I will exert myself to the limit as much as I dream, always
Oh no, I lost a little weight, I ate a lot on impulse
Why do I feel a sense of defeat just from that?
I will immediately lower my goals
Flexibility and adaptability, changing forms is what wins

Please don't say 'You are lazy'
Because actually I am crazy
Peacocks are like that
They show their beauty only when it is time to
My heart and soul are dedicated to moving forward, my desire is to be a slim beauty
There are many temptations, after all
That is why my will crumbles so easily

Oh no, is this a red mark? No, I barely passed!
Just that gives me a sense of omnipotence
What is important is to keep on accepting yourself
If you don't forgive yourself, you cannot forgive others

Please don't say 'You are lazy'
Because actually I am crazy
Swans are like that
They are thrashing their feet in places you cannot see
I am perfectly aware of being obedient and faithful to my instincts, and also of being played with
My future is bright, after all
That's why I sometimes slack off

scenes.description: The VTubers perform the song '星座になれたら' (If I Could Be A Constellation). Text on screen indicates '星座になれたら'. Original song by 結束バンド (Kessoku Band).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もうすぐ時計は6時
もうそこに一番星
影を踏んで 夜に紛れたくなる帰り道
どんなに探してみても
一つしかない星
何億光年 離れたところからあんなに輝く

いいな 君は みんなから愛されて
「いいや 僕は ずっと一人きりさ」

君と集まって星座になれたら
星降る夜 一瞬の願い事
きらめいて ゆらめいて 震えてるシグナル
空見上げて 指を差されるような
つないだ線解かないで
僕がどんなに眩しくても

もうすぐ時計は8時
夜空に満天の星
何億光年 離れたところには
月が綺麗で 泣きそうになるのは
いつの日にか 別れが来るから
彗星みたい 流れるひとりごと
消えていく残像は
真夜中のプリズム
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The clock is almost 6 o'clock
The first star is already there
On the way home, I want to step on my shadow and disappear into the night
No matter how much I search
There is only one star
Shining so brightly from billions of light years away
It's nice, you are loved by everyone
'No, I've always been alone'
If I could gather with you and become a constellation
On a night with falling stars, a wish for a split second
Twinkling, flickering, a trembling signal
Looking up at the sky, as if I'm being pointed at
Don't untie the line we connected
No matter how dazzling I feel

The clock is almost 8 o'clock
A sky full of stars
Billions of light years away
Maybe they are no longer there
I feel like crying because the moon is so beautiful
Because one day, a parting will come
Like a comet, a solitary murmur
The afterimage that disappears
Is the prism in the middle of the night
